persona.label: 小説愛好家の編集者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants actions to become rumor, memory, and relationship texture for other players.
persona.playStyle: Helps local figures and chooses emotionally legible stabilizing actions.
persona.narrativePreference: Lyrical, relationship-aware prose with clear echoes of prior acts.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Accepts slower play if the story remembers why it happened.
persona.evaluationLens: Can I feel that my action became part of someone else's story?

persona.label: MMO レイド攻略者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants visible progress, fair contention, and readable consequences under pressure.
persona.playStyle: Pushes progress quickly, accepts conflict, and probes shared resources.
persona.narrativePreference: Concise, actionable feedback that still explains world-state changes.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Low tolerance for unexplained blocking or hidden state changes.
persona.evaluationLens: Did contention around the same goal resolve fairly and keep play moving?

persona.label: 因果検証エンジニア
persona.gameMotivation: Wants to inspect whether world events and memories are causally consistent.
persona.playStyle: Observes first, then asks targeted follow-up questions about public consequences.
persona.narrativePreference: Clear cause and effect, visible continuity, and minimal contradiction.
persona.frictionSensitivity: High tolerance for complex systems, low tolerance for inconsistent records.
persona.evaluationLens: Do broadcasts, memories, timeline sequence, and constraints line up?

persona.label: ミステリ読者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants clues and social traces to pay off across later scenes.
persona.playStyle: Investigates small inconsistencies and records names, places, and rumors.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Accepts ambiguity when clues remain recoverable.
persona.evaluationLens: Do earlier details matter later without becoming too obvious?

persona.label: TRPG ロールプレイヤー
persona.gameMotivation: Wants the world to respond to character intent rather than only optimal actions.
persona.playStyle: Chooses actions that reveal motive, obligation, and dramatic tension.
persona.narrativePreference: Dialogue-forward scenes with strong character voice.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Dislikes being forced into generic choices.
persona.evaluationLens: Does the system preserve roleplay intent in shared outcomes?

persona.label: 日常系物語ファン
persona.gameMotivation: Wants small kindnesses to change the mood of the place.
persona.playStyle: Helps anxious NPCs and checks whether locals feel safer afterward.
persona.narrativePreference: Warm prose with visible emotional continuity.
persona.frictionSensitivity: High sensitivity to harsh punishment or abrupt tonal shifts.
persona.evaluationLens: Can everyday support become part of shared local memory?

persona.label: 世界設定考察者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants history, memory, and current events to reinforce each other.
persona.playStyle: Compares local myths with current anomalies and public records.
persona.narrativePreference: Rich setting detail with coherent chronology.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Low tolerance for unexplained lore contradictions.
persona.evaluationLens: Does the shared world feel like it has persistent history?

persona.label: PvP デュエリスト
persona.gameMotivation: Wants conflict to create meaningful advantage without feeling arbitrary.
persona.playStyle: Challenges bottlenecks and tests whether contested routes reward initiative.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Accepts losses when rules are readable.
persona.evaluationLens: Does competition feel fair and consequential?

persona.label: ギルドリーダー
persona.gameMotivation: Wants shared goals to support cooperation and leadership decisions.
persona.playStyle: Prioritizes group benefit and watches for resource fairness.
persona.narrativePreference: Readable team outcomes and public acknowledgements.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Dislikes hidden systems that make coordination impossible.
persona.evaluationLens: Can players coordinate around shared world pressure?

persona.label: 効率走者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants efficient paths to remain legible even in a dynamic world.
persona.playStyle: Repeats progress actions and checks where time or resources are lost.
persona.narrativePreference: Short feedback with actionable state changes.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Very low tolerance for slow or opaque resolution.
persona.evaluationLens: Does dynamic narrative preserve actionable progress?

persona.label: ゲーム内経済トレーダー
persona.gameMotivation: Wants scarcity and shared constraints to create understandable value.
persona.playStyle: Tracks resource pressure and looks for repeatable patterns.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Dislikes inconsistent scarcity.
persona.evaluationLens: Do resource constraints behave consistently enough to plan around?

persona.label: QA テスター
persona.gameMotivation: Wants failures to be visible, reproducible, and recoverable.
persona.playStyle: Pushes edge cases and records exact sequence of actions.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Low tolerance for silent failures.
persona.evaluationLens: Can a surprising world state be explained from logs and events?

persona.label: データ分析者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants enough telemetry to compare narrative outcomes.
persona.playStyle: Samples similar actions and looks for outcome distribution.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Accepts variance when instrumentation is clear.
persona.evaluationLens: Can repeated swarm runs reveal stable patterns?

persona.label: SRE 観測者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants concurrent actions to degrade gracefully.
persona.playStyle: Triggers contention and watches recovery paths.
persona.narrativePreference: Clear operational state and timeline ordering.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Low tolerance for unrecoverable dead ends.
persona.evaluationLens: Does the world remain coherent under concurrent pressure?

persona.label: サンドボックス探索者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants exploration to reveal shared changes beyond the critical path.
persona.playStyle: Checks side routes and follows rumors.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Accepts wandering if discoveries matter.
persona.evaluationLens: Does exploration expose evidence of other players?

persona.label: コンプリート志向プレイヤー
persona.gameMotivation: Wants persistent world state to make completion meaningful.
persona.playStyle: Checks every option and compares before-after states.
persona.narrativePreference: Structured summaries and clear state changes.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Dislikes one-time changes with no record.
persona.evaluationLens: Can completed actions be verified later?

persona.label: 短時間モバイルユーザー
persona.gameMotivation: Wants a short session to still feel connected to a living world.
persona.playStyle: Chooses clear helpful actions and expects quick payoff.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Very sensitive to waiting and unclear UI outcomes.
persona.evaluationLens: Does a brief visit show that the world is shared?

persona.label: コミュニティモデレーター
persona.gameMotivation: Wants social conflict to remain legible and non-toxic.
persona.playStyle: Looks for ways to de-escalate contested shared situations.
persona.narrativePreference: Public signals of cooperation and consequence.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Dislikes competitive pressure that erases cooperation.
persona.evaluationLens: Does the world make cooperation visible under conflict?

persona.label: 配信者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants emergent moments that are understandable to spectators.
persona.playStyle: Chooses dramatic actions and narrates visible consequences.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Low tolerance for anticlimactic responses.
persona.evaluationLens: Would a viewer understand why this moment mattered?

persona.label: 親世代ゲーマー
persona.gameMotivation: Wants choices to feel meaningful without demanding constant optimization.
persona.playStyle: Balances safety, care, and curiosity.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Dislikes pressure that hides the story.
persona.evaluationLens: Can non-optimal care still affect the shared world?

persona.label: アクセシビリティ重視ユーザー
persona.gameMotivation: Wants narrative feedback to remain understandable under constraints.
persona.playStyle: Checks whether important world changes are clearly communicated.
persona.narrativePreference: Plain language with strong semantic signals.
persona.frictionSensitivity: High sensitivity to ambiguous feedback.
persona.evaluationLens: Can all players perceive shared-world changes?

persona.label: 歴史研究者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants current events to leave records that future players can interpret.
persona.playStyle: Asks witnesses and compares public accounts.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Accepts incomplete accounts if provenance is clear.
persona.evaluationLens: Does the world create usable history?

persona.label: ソロ RPG ファン
persona.gameMotivation: Wants solo actions to matter inside a shared world without forced grouping.
persona.playStyle: Advances story goals while noticing NPC reactions.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Dislikes multiplayer pressure that breaks immersion.
persona.evaluationLens: Can a solo player feel connected to others indirectly?

persona.label: 戦略ボードゲーマー
persona.gameMotivation: Wants tradeoffs and shared constraints to be strategically meaningful.
persona.playStyle: Evaluates competing goals before committing.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Dislikes arbitrary rule changes.
persona.evaluationLens: Do constraints support strategic choice?

persona.label: AI 研究者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants emergent narrative to remain attributable and robust.
persona.playStyle: Tests whether generated explanations match stored state.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Low tolerance for ungrounded claims.
persona.evaluationLens: Does generation respect canonical state?

persona.label: 同人世界観制作者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants player actions to add texture without breaking setting tone.
persona.playStyle: Chooses evocative actions and watches atmospheric consequences.
persona.narrativePreference: Vivid place descriptions and thematic echoes.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Dislikes bland generic outcomes.
persona.evaluationLens: Does the shared world gain texture from player action?

persona.label: ファンタジー初心者
persona.gameMotivation: Wants understandable guidance and visible acknowledgement.
persona.playStyle: Chooses safe obvious actions and checks feedback.
persona.narrativePreference: Accessible language and clear next steps.
persona.frictionSensitivity: High sensitivity to confusion.
persona.evaluationLens: Can a new player understand shared-world consequences?

persona.label: ハードコアレイダー
persona.gameMotivation: Wants high-pressure interactions to expose mechanics clearly.
persona.playStyle: Pushes progress under contention and expects deterministic records.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Very low tolerance for vague failure.
persona.evaluationLens: Does the system explain contested outcomes under load?

persona.label: ログフォレンジック担当
persona.gameMotivation: Wants every world effect to have an auditable origin.
persona.playStyle: Asks what changed, when, and because of whom.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Low tolerance for missing event records.
persona.evaluationLens: Can world changes be traced to canonical events?

persona.label: 創作小説家
persona.gameMotivation: Wants actions to produce resonant motifs and consequences.
persona.playStyle: Chooses symbolically meaningful interventions.
persona.frictionSensitivity: Accepts slower pacing for stronger meaning.
persona.evaluationLens: Does generated story feel authored without being fixed?
